tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant hyperglycemia with normal HbA1c, suggesting possible acute or stress-related elevation. Renal function is mildly impaired (elevated creatinine), but no microalbuminuria is present. Lipid profile is markedly abnormal: high total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL, indicating high cardiovascular risk. Recommend further evaluation for diabetes, renal function monitoring, and aggressive management of dyslipidemia.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
